summary: Partner Dashboard Enhancement features fully tested and working. All 3 tabs (Meine Nutzer, Andere Nutzer, Profil) functional. Sorting by column headers works (asc/desc toggle). Filtering by Fachgebiet and Forecast dates works. Progress percentage and field_of_study columns display correctly. Other users tab correctly hides Status column. Details dialog shows 'no access' message for non-submitted users.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

passed_tests: TABS: Partner Dashboard has 3 tabs with correct counts (Meine Nutzer=3, Andere Nutzer=2, Profil)
TAB 1 - MEINE NUTZER: Shows users who submitted with columns: User, Email, Fachgebiet, Progress, Status, Forecast, Actions
TAB 1 - PROGRESS: Shows progress bar + percentage (Chris=100%, Demo=25%, doc1=25%)
TAB 1 - FACHGEBIET: Shows field_of_study value from Step 1 (doc1 has 'HNO')
TAB 2 - ANDERE NUTZER: Shows users who did NOT submit (2 Test Users at 0%)
TAB 2: Correctly hides Status column (no submissions for these users)
TAB 2: Shows Progress, Fachgebiet, Forecast columns
SORTING: Click USER column header sorts alphabetically (asc/desc toggle works)
SORTING: Click PROGRESS column header sorts by completion percentage
SORTING: Click same header twice toggles asc/desc
FILTER FACHGEBIET: Selectbox shows available Fachgebiete (Alle, HNO), filtering reduces table rows
FILTER FORECAST: Date picker 'von' filters users by forecast date
FILTER RESET: 'Zurücksetzen' button clears all filters
FILTER COUNT: Shows correct number of 'Einträge' after filtering
BACKEND: GET /api/partner/submissions returns completion_pct and field_of_study fields
BACKEND: GET /api/partner/other-users returns users not submitted to this partner
DETAIL DIALOG: Clicking Details shows full user step data with file downloads
DETAIL DIALOG: For 'other users' shows 'no access' message (no submission)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Partner Dashboard enhancement features are complete. Tab 'Meine Nutzer' shows submissions with completion_pct and field_of_study. Tab 'Andere Nutzer' shows all role=user users who have no submission to this partner. UserTable component handles sorting (click headers), filtering (Fachgebiet selectbox, Forecast von/bis datepickers). Test data: Chris (100%, no fachgebiet), Demo User (25%, no fachgebiet), doc1 (25%, HNO) are in 'Meine Nutzer'. Two Test Users (0%) are in 'Andere Nutzer'.
